description: The interior of Fred's humble shoebox. It is sparsely furnished with a discarded cotton ball for a bed and a plastic lace-tip for a table. The walls are made of cardboard. It is very quiet here—too quiet.

wall.description: A sturdy cardboard wall. It smells faintly of new shoes.

floor.description: A soft, slightly fuzzy floor made of recycled tissue paper.

exit_south.description: The exit leads out to the street of Shoeboxlandia.

exit_east.description: A small crack in the wall leads to your neighbor's shoebox.

item_bed.description: A soft cotton ball bed. It's not much, but it's home.

item.name: Note
item.description: A handwritten note: 'Fred, don't forget to scream today! - Mom'

npc_freddista.description: Freddista is standing by the wall, her high-heeled silhouette looking formidable.

dialogue.text: "Fred! You're finally awake. Someone stole your lunch while you were dreaming about being a sneaker."
Fred lets out a long, high-pitched scream. "Whaaaat?! My pasta and potatoes?! Gone?!"
Freddista sighs. "Yes, Fred. I think it was that waffle from Breakfastopia. He looked suspicious. Let's go find him. I'll come with you—you can't navigate the world without my stare."
"Well, what are you waiting for? Let's go out to the street! Breakfastopia is just past the city gates."
"The world is dangerous, Fred. Keep your laces tied and your tongue ready. Now, move it!"
